caption:
here are some things the internet does not tell you about traveling to Japan 🇯🇵

#japan #japantravel #japantravelguide #japantrip #japanitinerary
transcript: Here are some things that the internet did not tell me about Japan that I would have loved to know before I visited. The first item on the list is that you will be eating breakfast at 7-Eleven whether you want to or not. Oftentimes coffee shops don't open until 10 or 11 a.m. If you're heading to a team lab location, then you're going to want to book a spot in advance online and make sure that you don't wear a skirt or dress because you will be walking through water. If you visit Kyoto, then the Korean style beef katsu is an absolute must try. This remained at the very top of our list for foods that we ate across Japan. If a bar offers plum wine that's mixed with soda water, then you should order it. If you're doing any specific sightseeing, then the earlier is better when showing up. Ichiran ramen is in fact worth the hype, especially if you're doing any sort of solo traveling and want a quality meal, but you are dining alone. However, there are so many other spots that you will stumble across that serve quality ramen with a similar experience that Ichiran offers. Everybody talks about the amazing vintage shopping, but people are failing to mention that it is all still expensive, so I didn't even end up buying anything. Japan is extremely hot and humid during the summer, and that includes the first couple of weeks in September. Japan has a world-renowned system of railways, so definitely use that when you are traveling.

transcript_segments.text: Here are some things that the internet did not tell me about Japan that I would have loved to know before I visited.
The first item on the list is that you will be eating breakfast at 7-Eleven whether you want to or not.
Oftentimes coffee shops don't open until 10 or 11 a.m.
If you're heading to a team lab location, then you're going to want to book a spot in advance online
and make sure that you don't wear a skirt or dress because you will be walking through water.
If you visit Kyoto, then the Korean style beef katsu is an absolute must try.
This remained at the very top of our list for foods that we ate across Japan.
If a bar offers plum wine that's mixed with soda water, then you should order it.
If you're doing any specific sightseeing, then the earlier is better when showing up.
Ichiran ramen is in fact worth the hype, especially if you're doing any sort of solo traveling and want a quality meal, but you are dining alone.
However, there are so many other spots that you will stumble across that serve quality ramen with a similar experience that Ichiran offers.
Everybody talks about the amazing vintage shopping, but people are failing to mention that it is all still expensive,
so I didn't even end up buying anything.
Japan is extremely hot and humid during the summer, and that includes the first couple of weeks in September.
Japan has a world-renowned system of railways, so definitely use that when you are traveling.
